---
---
# {{ site.title }}

> Personal blog by {{ site.author }}. Posts on AI, startups, family, engineering, education, and creativity.

Every post is available in three formats at parallel URLs: HTML at the canonical path, plain markdown at `/index.md`, and structured JSON at `/index.json`. The links below point to the markdown versions, which are the most useful for agent consumption. Discovery for an individual page is also exposed via `<link rel="alternate" type="text/markdown">` and `<link rel="alternate" type="application/json">` in the HTML `<head>`.

## Posts
{% for post in site.posts %}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}index.md) — {{ post.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}{% if post.excerpt %}. {{ post.excerpt | strip_html | strip_newlines }}{% endif %}
{%- endfor %}

## Pages

- [Home]({{ site.url }}/)
- [Product Advisor]({{ site.url }}/product-advisor/)
- [Nerd Stuff]({{ site.url }}/nerd-stuff/)
- [Atom feed]({{ site.url }}/feed.xml)
- [Sitemap]({{ site.url }}/sitemap.xml)
- [AI content manifest]({{ site.url }}/ai-content-manifest.json)
